description_long: This is a compact, boxy combat tactical vehicle with a green and brown color scheme, featuring a reinforced front end and angular body panels. The vehicle has a prominent roof-mounted turret equipped with a machine gun, accessible via a hatch. Its windows are small and appear reinforced, with visible hinges and handles on the doors, suggesting armored protection. The rear cargo area is covered with a brown, textured panel, and the back features a metal step ladder for access. The vehicle rides on four large, rugged tires with a blocky tread pattern suitable for off-road use. Military insignia and markings are visible on the hood and doors, adding to its tactical appearance.
description: A compact, armored combat tactical vehicle with a roof-mounted machine gun, reinforced windows, and military markings. It features a green and brown color scheme and rugged off-road tires.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular hood with a large military insignia, reinforced bumper, and two headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the roof-mounted turret, armored doors with handles, and rugged tires.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the brown cargo cover, metal step ladder, and rear lights.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the turret, armored doors, and tire details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One visible roof-mounted machine gun turret located centrally above the cabin.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible armor plating covers the full body, including the hood, doors, and rear cargo area, with angular, reinforced panels and apparent thickness suggesting ballistic protection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid green with brown rear cargo cover and a stylized insignia; no complex camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: Large star emblem with red and yellow accents on the hood and doors.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, rugged off-road tires with blocky tread pattern and reinforced sidewalls.
